title: Stabilize CodeWiki self-hosting baseline
summary: Make CodeWiki stable enough to dogfood by aligning canonical rebuild, event/state sources, tests, and validation before continuing graph/compiler/role refactors.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki has one trusted self-hosting baseline: TypeScript rebuild is canonical, event/state sources agree, tests pass, and verifier closure can be trusted again.
acceptance: Configured rebuild path uses the TypeScript rebuild engine, not extensions/codewiki/src/engine/rebuild.ts or external command aliases.
Legacy legacy rebuild script is removed, archived outside runtime/package scope, or clearly non-runtime with no config/test/docs dependency.
Canonical event/state source for resume/session focus is documented and used consistently by rebuild, codewiki_state, /wiki-resume, and tests.
TASK-042 acceptance passes under the same canonical rebuild path used by codewiki_state and task close verifier.
Smoke tests cover fresh-session persisted focus, generated status/queue agreement, and absence of legacy rebuild dependency.
README, templates, KB, roadmap refs, and gateway scripts no longer advertise legacy external as the starter/runtime rebuild path.
codewiki_state refresh=true returns green and fresh verifier agrees with npm run typecheck + npm test.
non_goals: Do not implement full TASK-044 graph-first index beyond what is needed for a stable baseline.
Do not implement TASK-045 build schemas or TASK-046 tester/builder roles in this stabilization task.
Do not redesign product/system KB layout.
Do not broaden scope to unrelated UI polish.
verification: grep -R for legacy external rebuild/runtime stale refs in README, templates, KB, source, scripts, roadmap
Attempt to close TASK-042 after stabilization and confirm verifier passes.

delta.desired: One TypeScript canonical CodeWiki runtime supports reliable dogfooding and future refactors.
delta.current: Repo truth is split: docs and decisions say TypeScript/graph/compiler model, but config, scripts, tests, generated state, and verifier still see legacy external/events legacy paths.
delta.closure: TASK-042 and future CodeWiki tasks can be validated against the same rebuilt state that tests and agents use.
